items.content: Most Al chatbots give you basic "projects." Gemini just built you a second brain. 🧠 Introducing Notebooks: some of the magic from @NotebookLM, integrated directly into @GeminiApp. Here's what changes for you today: 📚 Upload 100 sources for free 📂 Organize your chats - the wait is officially over :) 🔄 Sources, chats, and emojis sync People are using Gemini and NotebookLM in tandem, and we'll keep building both. To manage capacity, we're rolling this out NOW on the web and going from Ultra ➡️…
